dvids.title: U.S. Central Command Forces Remain Ready
dvids.desc: U.S. Central Command forces remain ready. (Courtesy Video)

dvids.title: U.S. Forces Disable Vessel Attempting to Enter Iranian Port, Violate Blockade
dvids.desc: TAMPA, Fla. – U.S. forces operating in the Arabian Sea enforced naval blockade measures against an Iranian-flagged cargo vessel attempting to sail toward an Iranian port, April 19.
